BREAKOUT.name: Breakout Strategy
BREAKOUT.description: Price breakout detection - buys when price breaks above range high, sells below range low

backtest_results.note: High frequency on tick data - commission heavy

RSI_SWING.name: RSI Swing Strategy
RSI_SWING.description: Buy oversold (RSI<20), sell overbought (RSI>70) - lower frequency, higher conviction

BOLLINGER.name: Bollinger Bounce
BOLLINGER.description: Buy at lower band (3 std), sell at mean - mean reversion with volatility bands

backtest_results.note: 92% win rate but commission kills profit

MACD.name: MACD Crossover
MACD.description: Classic trend following - buy on MACD cross above signal, sell on cross below

DONCHIAN.name: Donchian Breakout (Turtle)
DONCHIAN.description: Turtle Trading method - buy on channel breakout, hold for X periods

ALPHA_ENGINE.name: Alpha Engine (Confluence Filter)
ALPHA_ENGINE.description: Combines 6 alpha signals (breakout, volume, ATR, RSI, regime, sentiment) with weighted scoring. Filters trades that don't meet confluence threshold.

backtest_results.note: vs baseline: +0.32% return, +10.5% win rate, -0.87% drawdown

SCALP_ML_V1.name: Scalp ML (LightGBM)
SCALP_ML_V1.description: ML scalping with 12 orderbook/tick features, 30s prediction horizon. Entry: 0.04%, TP: 0.07%, SL: 0.04%, Max hold: 60s

backtest_results.note: Requires training - run train_scalp_model.py after collecting tick data

SCALP_TICK.name: Tick Scalper (Mean Reversion)
SCALP_TICK.description: Fast momentum scalping on tick data. Buys dips (0.20% drop in 20 ticks), targets 0.18%, stops at 0.12%. Max hold 50 ticks.
